data.title: Georgia Louise, renowned esthetician, offers exclusive facial treatments in Aspen at The Little Nell this winter.
data.description: This winter in Aspen, Colorado, a unique partnership will provide exclusive access to groundbreaking facial treatments. Starting on December 12, 2025, guests staying at The Little Nell and residents of Aspen will have the rare chance to experience transformative facial therapies. This opportunity offers unparalleled access to highly sought-after treatments, setting a new standard in skincare innovations. Don't miss this limited-time chance to indulge in cutting-edge facial services that promise to redefine the beauty experience.

data.title: PPG's Adriana Macouzet retiring on April 30, 2026; Jennifer Solcz to lead protective and marine coatings in the Americas.
data.description: PPG announced today that Adriana Macouzet, Vice President of PPG Latin America and General Manager of Protective and Marine Coatings (PMC) for Latin America, will be retiring on April 30, 2026. Following Macouzet's retirement, Jennifer Solcz, Vice President of Protective and Marine Coatings for the United States and Canada (USCA), will take on the role of Vice President of Protective and Marine Coatings for the Americas, which will encompass the USCA region.

data.title: Investor interest in memecoins hits 2024 lows while TradFi leveraged ETFs soar to a record $239B amid speculative surge.
data.description: Demand for memecoins among cryptocurrency investors is currently at its lowest levels since 2024. This comes in contrast to the increasing speculative interest in Traditional Finance (TradFi) leveraged Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), which have reached a historic high of $239 billion.

data.title: Viceroy Residences Clearwater Beach enhances sales efforts with a dedicated team and partners for 86 luxury units.
data.description: In Clearwater Beach, Florida, BH3 Management and U.S. Development are expanding the sales approach for Viceroy Residences Clearwater Beach, an 86-unit upscale beachfront condo project aiming to transform living on Florida’s Gulf Coast. With a shift towards a focused sales team, Waypoint Resort Real Estate has been selected to spearhead the sales effort and enhance the project’s strategic direction. This new strategy comes as part of the next phase of development for the luxury condominiums.

data.title: Klick Health partners with Baraka Hospital to provide 1,600 life-changing surgeries in Kenya's Mara region.
data.description: A company from Toronto and New York recently revisited Baraka Hospital in rural Kenya, where they initially helped build the facility over 15 years ago. This time, they collaborated with local healthcare professionals to facilitate 1,600 transformative surgeries for individuals in Kenya's Mara region. This initiative is showcased in the company's latest holiday video titled 'Many Hands,' emphasizing community support. The video was shot on-site with music from a well-known artist based in Nairobi.

data.title: Libby Hikind, founder of GrantWatch, releases children's books, expanding collection available in major retailers and libraries.
data.description: Prominent educator and founder of GrantWatch, Libby Hikind, has recently introduced an increased range of children's books that can now be found in various major retailers and libraries. This expansion of her collection reflects her dedication to providing quality literary content for young readers. The unveiling took place in Boynton Beach, Florida on December 12, 2025. Libby's impactful work exemplifies how a single narrative can evolve into a widespread influence, with her books now reaching a larger audience through various distribution channels.

data.title: MT Højgaard Holding A/S sells Arssarnerit, last business in Greenland; sale to close in second quarter 2026.
data.description: MT Højgaard Holding recently announced the sale of its remaining business operation in Greenland, Arssarnerit, a technical contracting and service company. The transaction is anticipated to finalize in the second quarter of 2026 pending approval from competition authorities.

data.title: PitchBook releases 2026 Outlook reports on global private markets trends highlighting key investments ahead.
data.description: In Seattle, PitchBook, a top private capital market intelligence provider, has published its 2026 Outlook report series, presenting data-driven insights into investment trends likely to influence private markets in the upcoming year. Comprising seven reports, the series draws on the knowledge of PitchBook's worldwide research team, covering areas such as venture capital, private equity, AI, emerging technology sectors, and established industries. Following a period of restricted liquidity and inconsistent deal flow, the reports aim to provide a comprehensive overview of market projections.

data.title: RGP CFO Survey: Gap between AI ambition and readiness widens in finance sector; hindrances include fragile data foundations and slow governance.
data.description: In Dallas, professional services firm RGP® (Nasdaq: RGP) has published a new report titled "The AI Foundational Divide: From Ambition to Readiness." This study delves into the growing disparity between high expectations for AI and the lack of operational preparedness needed to achieve tangible benefits. The report highlights the financial sector's rapid movement towards an AI-driven environment but also notes obstacles such as weak data infrastructure, outdated systems, and developing governance protocols.

data.title: Capcom's new IP PRAGMATA to launch on April 24, 2026, a sci-fi action-adventure game from Japan.
data.description: Capcom, a renowned gaming company based in Osaka, Japan, has announced the launch date for their latest project, PRAGMATA. This sci-fi action-adventure game is set to be released on April 24, 2026. PRAGMATA is a completely original intellectual property from Capcom, adding to their diverse gaming portfolio. Fans of the genre can look forward to immersing themselves in this new gaming experience set to be unveiled in just a few years.
Fed's Hammack: Job market break-even is greatly reduced.

data.title: MDE School gets $10,500 from GBC via Georgia SSO Tax Credit Program to aid low-income student scholarships.
data.description: MDE School recently disclosed that it has obtained a $10,500 donation from the Georgia Student Scholarship Organization (Georgia SSO) owing to Georgia Banking Company's (GBC) involvement in the state's tax credit initiative. The contribution will be allocated to need-based initiatives at the school.

data.title: CR Fitness Holdings LLC to open Crunch McKinney studio in Texas, a $12M facility spanning 40,000 sq ft.
data.description: On December 12, 2025, in Dallas, it was announced by CR Fitness Holdings LLC that Crunch McKinney, a new state-of-the-art fitness facility, will be opening soon. This facility is anticipated to open in 2026 and will span 40,000 square feet, with an investment of $12 million. CR Fitness Holdings LLC is a prominent franchisee of Crunch Fitness, known for its rapid growth and success in the industry.
Fed's Hammack: Right now, the Fed policy is right around neutral.
FED'S HAMMACK: WOULD PREFER FOR FED POLICY TO BE A LITTLE MORE RESTRICTIVE THAN CURRENT LEVEL

data.title: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. reports Q3 2025: Net sales $61.1 million (46.9% increase), gross profit $21.0 million.
data.description: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PPIH) reported its financial performance for the quarter ending October 31, 2025, from The Woodlands, Texas. The company disclosed that their net sales for this quarter reached $61.1 million, showcasing a significant surge of $19.5 million or 46.9% compared to the previous year’s $41.6 million during the same period. The boost was primarily attributed to increased sales volumes in the Middle East and North America. Additionally, the gross profit rose to $21.0 million, marking a $6.9 million increase from the prior year's $14.1 million.
